title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. February Curse is Broken as Capesize Rates Surge - The recent surge in dry bulk spot rates has defied the seasonal weakness that typically characterizes the market at this time of the year.

OCR text:
© BREAKWAVE
ADVISORS
Dry Bulk Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report February 17, 2026
* February Curse is Broken as Capesize Rates Surge - The recent surge in dry
bulk spot rates has defied the seasonal weakness that typically characterizes the CES
market at this time of the year. Robust demand across all segments has propelled Momentum: 5 Neutral
spot rates to record highs for this period, subsequently driving futures to historic Sentiment: Neutral
levels for as long as one can see.

"The Batic Dry Index (80!) measures the average spat rates for dry bulk freight with a sector weighting of 40% Copesize, 30% Panamax ond 30% Supramax. The Breatwove Ory Futures index (BDRYFF) is designed to track freight futures contracts with o sector weighting of SOX Capesize, 40% Posamax and 10%
Supramax and a weighted overage maturity of approximately SO-70 days.
